functions.name: AppShell
Kpi
params:
{ 
  label, 
  value, 
  sub, 
  tone, 
  primary, 
  spark,
  onClick
}

functions.name: LineChart
params:
{ 
  points, 
  target, 
  fmt, 
  mean, 
  color = "var(--accent)",
  stage,
  metric,
  height = 280
}

functions.name: Donut
params:
{ 
  data, 
  fmt,
  size = 160,
  fontSize = 12,
  hideLegend = false
}

callGraph.callee: points.map((p, i) => `${(i / (points.length - 1)) * W},${H - ((p.value - min) / (max - min || 1)) * H}`).join

functions.name: TrendLine
params:
{
  cycles,
  values,
  target,
  height = 220,
  showTarget = true,
  accentIdx = -1,
}

functions.name: HorizontalBars
params:
{
  data,
  labelKey,
  valueKey,
  suffix = "",
  height = 260,
  accentTop = true,
}

functions.name: VerticalBars
params:
{
  data,
  labelKey,
  valueKey,
  suffix = "",
  height = 240,
  target = null,
  subLabelFn,
}
